2003March 10, 2003

🇺🇸 San Diego, CA, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, San Diego, United States, March 10, 2003 -- March 14, 2003

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2003-03-san-diego-ca-usa

20 Resolutions

572Plenary
Reappoint Jean-Jacques Michel as JWG 8 Convenor
SC 4 re-appoints Jean-Jacques MICHEL as convenor of JWG 8 for an additional three-year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
571Plenary
Endorse proposal to VAMAS for testing of material standards
SC 4 endorses the proposal N1457 to VAMAS for the comparison and validation of the different standards for the representation and the exchange of data for Life Cycle Assessment (LCA), as part of th...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
570Plenary
Request public availability of SC 4 standards
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to request approval from the ISO Council to make the following documents publicly available, free of charge, on the World Wide Web: * ISO 10303 (STEP) * ISO 13584 (PLI...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
569Plenary
Solicit input for Education and Outreach Rapporteur
SC 4 invites its experts, member bodies and liaisons to provide input to the Education and Outreach Rapporteur about the major problems of perception that have been identified and the needs and opp...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
568Plenary
Propose Category A liaison with ISO/TC 67
SC 4 proposes a Category A liaison with ISO/TC 67, nominates Nils Sandsmark as the liaison officer for a period of two years, and requests that the SC 4 secretary confirms this liaison with the ISO...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
567Plenary
Approve minor revision of ISO 10303-210:2001
SC 4 approves the creation of a new edition of ISO 10303-210 as a minor revision to correct errors in EXPRESS, Mapping Tables, Application Object definitions, and orthography.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
566Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with SASIG
SC 4 proposes the establishment of a Category A liaison with the Strategic Automotive product data Standards Industry Group (SASIG) and nominates Oscar Rocha as its liaison officer for the next two...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
565Plenary
Extend Task Force for Industrial Data on the Web
SC 4 directs the ad hoc group for Industrial Data on the Web (IDW) to report regularly to SC 4 plenaries concerning the impact of established and emerging Web technologies on the work of SC 4. Thes...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
564Plenary
Cancel Resolution 462 and integrate module harmonization
SC 4 cancels its Resolution 462 that established a STEP Modules Harmonization Team.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
563Plenary
Appoint Len Slovensky as WG 3 Deputy Convenor
SC 4 approves Len Slovensky to serve as Deputy Convenor of its Working Group 3 for a period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
562Plenary
Appoint Keith Hunten as WG 12 Convenor
SC 4 approves Keith Hunten to serve as Convenor of its Working Group 12 for a period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
561Plenary
Evaluate reduction of meetings frequency
SC 4 reviews the necessity of 3 meetings per year and asks its member bodies whether they support the current situation. If the member bodies agree to reduce the number of meetings to two meetings ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
560Plenary
Review active experts database
SC 4 requests its secretary to request its national bodies to review their list of active persons for SC 4 and send input for update of database to SC 4 secretary previous to SC 4 meetings.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
559Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 appreciates the participation and support of the new ISO/TC 184 Chair Mr. Jean- Marc CHATELARD and the Secretary Ms Christine HERMETET-FILEZ.

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere thanks to Chris Kreiler (CACI) for his untiring efforts and excellent performance in supporting the work of the Secretariat.

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere thanks to Mark Palmer for his long-standing, dedicated efforts and excellent performance as the leader of T20, WG 3.

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
